available_claims.description: Both teams score at least once.
The selected match finishes with the submitted home and away score.
At least one goal is scored before halftime.
The selected match has at least 2 card events.
The selected match finishes with at least 2 total goals.
The selected match has at least 2 yellow-card events.
The selected match finishes with 3 or more total goals.
No goal is scored from minute 1 through minute 10.
No goal is scored in first-half or second-half stoppage time.
The selected player scores at least one non-own goal.
The selected player scores at least 2 non-own goals.
At least one red-card or second-yellow-red event is shown.
The selected team concedes first and still wins the match.
The selected team scores the first countable goal.
The selected team wins by at least 3 goals.

stake_rules.green: 15% of the team's points before the matchday
stake_rules.red: 35% of the team's points before the matchday
stake_rules.yellow: 25% of the team's points before the matchday
